badge: Pioneering Excellence in the 401(k) Industry and Beyond
title: Who We Are
description: Founded in 2008, we are proud to be the first USA Bangladesh joint venture company to partner with a US FinTech firm in the 401(k) industry. With over 500 professionals, we manage more than nine thousand US retirement plans and 50+ outside TPA clients, ensuring top-notch service and compliance. Our software team develops tailored solutions to enhance efficiency, reflecting our commitment to innovation and excellence in retirement plan management.
